name: residual_render_path_purge
summary: Removed direct render fallbacks from debtor list UI events and fixed list refresh path to invalidate-only.
Simplified App.renderAll() to a commitAll alias with an explicit legacy reason.
Converted refreshOtherViews() to commit/invalidate-only and removed summary direct-render hook.
Reused debtor-detail-root when possible to avoid rebuilding the panel host each detail render.
Added explicit commitAll reasons for snapshot apply/reset paths and passed load reasons from cloud/local/auth callers.
qa_focus: list search / page / filter actions invalidate DEBTOR_LIST without direct render fallback
cloud load / local restore / app relaunch reason tracing
